3310660.name: mocopi VR
3310660.description:
Enjoy Steam VR Games and Applications with mocopi VR

  • By combining mocopi sensors with SteamVR-compatible VR equipment, you can experience full-body tracking.

  • Easily assign mocopi sensors to different body parts, calibrate them, and reset poses as needed.

To use this application, you will need the following:

  • mocopi sensors

  • Sensor data reciever for mocopi

  • SteamVR-compatible VR equipment

For information on required PC specifications, please refer to the mocopi product page and the system requirements for this application.
3310660.supported_languages: 英语, 简体中文, 日语
